strengths: Broad full-stack and systems engineering depth spanning web, mobile, embedded, low-latency microservices, and DevOps across 17+ years — meets the experience floor.
Demonstrable entrepreneurial instinct via GISCollective (founder, open-source geo-data platform) and a history of picking up ownership gaps (e.g., taking over iOS/Apple TV at WatchUp).
Current hands-on AI-agent work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, shows active engagement with the AI tooling space.
concerns: AI expertise is very recent (April 2025 onwards) and tactical in scope; the role requires recognized, demonstrated AI platform-building and the ability to advise strategic customers at a directorial level.
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no evidence of published research, industry thought leadership, or speaking engagements beyond a single domain-specific FOSS4G talk.
Career trajectory is predominantly individual-contributor implementation work with no cloud strategy, executive advisory, or cross-organizational technical leadership visible in the resume.

key_factors.factor: Absence of strategic advisory or thought-leadership evidence

response.justification: Aisha brings genuine engineering breadth and a self-starter ethos, but the profile is misaligned with this director-level AI strategy role in two critical dimensions: AI experience is confined to the most recent months and lacks the platform-scale, recognized-expertise, or advisory history the position demands, and there is no track record of influencing organizational or customer strategy at the level expected of a principal IC operating at director seniority.
